report.title: Tesla 财报与电话会深读样例

conclusion.summary: 这是一份示例报告，用来展示 stock-deepread 的 HTML 结构与证据纪律。样例结论不是实时投资判断；真实使用时必须刷新最新披露、电话会和股价数据。
conclusion.key_debate: 市场到底在给短期交付和毛利压力定价，还是在提前定价自动驾驶与储能的长期期权。
conclusion.next_catalyst: 下一次交付数据、毛利率趋势、储能部署和管理层对自动驾驶商业化节奏的更新。
conclusion.main_disconfirming_evidence: 如果价格竞争继续侵蚀汽车毛利，且储能或软件收入无法弥补，长期叙事需要下修。

findings.title: 核心不是只看 EPS beat/miss，而是汽车毛利能否止住下滑。
body: 价格、产品 mix、产能利用率和原材料成本共同决定汽车业务的利润底座。
如果毛利率继续下探，市场会降低对长期期权的容忍度。

findings.title: 储能是财务桥里的第二增长曲线，但还需要看部署、毛利和现金转换。
body: 储能收入增速本身不够，关键是它能否贡献可持续毛利和现金流。
需要把订单、产能和交付节奏拆开看。

findings.title: 电话会的真正信息量在 Q&A：管理层是否直接回答需求和毛利问题。
body: prepared remarks 通常强调长期愿景，Q&A 更能暴露投资者担心的短期变量。
回避或反复强调的措辞应进入后续跟踪清单。

findings.title: 社媒叙事只能解释注意力，不能证明订单、客户或估值。
body: 样例中社媒只作为市场叙事热度，不作为事实或投资结论的独立证据。

financial_bridge.read: Separate volume, ASP, mix, FX and one-offs.
Pricing and utilization matter more than headline deliveries.
Inventory, receivables and capex decide cash quality.

segments.name: Automotive
segments.watch_item: Gross margin, deliveries, inventory days, price cuts.

segments.name: Energy generation and storage
segments.change: High growth can matter if margin and cash conversion hold.

segments.name: Services and other
segments.change: Useful for retention and ecosystem economics, but not yet the main valuation driver.
segments.watch_item: Service gross margin and warranty signals.

segments.name: AI/FSD/Robotaxi
segments.change: Valuation impact depends on verified commercialization milestones.
segments.watch_item: Regulatory approvals, attach rate, revenue recognition.

supply_chain.title: EV buyers / fleet / grid storage customers
supply_chain.evidence: Demand sensitivity to price, financing rates and policy incentives.

supply_chain.title: Battery cells, packs, power electronics, compute
supply_chain.evidence: Management commentary and supplier/industry evidence need cross-checking.

supply_chain.title: Cell capacity, factories, lithium materials, manufacturing automation
supply_chain.evidence: Capacity and cost curve determine margin durability.

supply_chain.title: Lithium, nickel, grid interconnect, subsidies
supply_chain.evidence: External data and policy context affect cost and demand.

items.read: Long-term autonomy and energy narrative emphasized.
items.watch: Which claims map to current revenue.

items.read: Analysts likely press on demand, pricing and margin.
Any disappearance of prior demand confidence should be flagged.

price_context.note: Use live price source in real report.

drivers.name: Fundamental surprise
drivers.read: Margin and cash-flow quality are plausible primary drivers.

drivers.name: Guidance tone
drivers.read: Management language can amplify or offset the financial print.

drivers.name: Sector beta
drivers.read: Benchmark and auto peer moves prevent over-attributing to company news.

drivers.name: Social narrative
drivers.read: Online debate may explain attention and positioning, not facts.

summary: No full sell-side report is included in this sample.
A real report should state whether full text was obtained, then compare public rating or target-price changes against company disclosures.

checks.support: Needs official margin bridge and management commentary.
checks.limit: Cannot be proven by social narrative.

scenarios.name: Bull
scenarios.thesis: Margin stabilizes while energy and software optionality gain evidence.
scenarios.assumptions: No further severe price war; storage deployments scale.

scenarios.name: Base
scenarios.thesis: Auto remains under pressure, energy helps but does not fully re-rate the stock.
scenarios.disconfirming: Either demand snaps back or cash flow deteriorates sharply.

scenarios.name: Bear
scenarios.thesis: Pricing pressure and capex overwhelm long-duration optionality.
scenarios.assumptions: Lower ASP, weaker cash conversion, delayed autonomy monetization.
scenarios.disconfirming: Verified high-margin software/energy contribution arrives earlier.

sources.title: Tesla Investor Relations earnings release placeholder
sources.used_for: Core financial metrics and segment disclosure

sources.title: Tesla earnings call webcast/transcript placeholder
sources.used_for: Management language, prepared remarks and Q&A

sources.title: Tesla Form 10-Q / 10-K placeholder
sources.used_for: Financial statements, cash flow and risk disclosures

sources.title: Market price and benchmark placeholder
sources.used_for: Event-window price reaction and benchmark comparison

sources.title: Public social-media narrative placeholder
sources.used_for: Market narrative and attention signal only

disclaimer: 样例仅展示 stock-deepread 报告结构、证据分级和 HTML 样式，不构成投资建议，也不是实时 Tesla 分析。
